body.text: Friday wrap: VA hardware-ban decision T-8, DOJ Colorado suits week-2 day-9, ATF transport NPRM comment-day 9

Governor Spanberger has 8 days remaining on the VA assault-firearm sales ban / carry ban / hospital ban package (deadline May 23). DOJ Colorado lawsuits cross to week-2 day-9 with the first scheduling order still the next concrete data point.

facts.title: 1. VA hardware-ban bills on Gov. Spanberger's desk (T-8)
2. DOJ vs. Denver + Colorado — week 2 day 9

body.text:
• VA hardware-ban bills on Gov. desk (T-8); Governor's office still 'no comment'
• DOJ Denver + Colorado suits week 2 day 9; scheduling order still pending
• ATF Sec. 926A transport NPRM — comment day 9 of 90
• Brace + EITB Week 2 day 5; ~T-82 to close; submissions ahead of curve
